description_long: This is a large, two-story suburban house surrounded by a low stone wall and featuring a well-manicured lawn and garden areas. The house has a complex, multi-hipped roof with several gables and dormers, and its exterior is finished in a light color with numerous large windows. A driveway leads to an attached garage on one side, with a car parked in front. The backyard includes rows of neatly planted trees and what appears to be a vegetable or flower garden. The front entryway is centrally located, accessible by a short path, and is flanked by symmetrical landscaping. The overall design is spacious and elegant, with a blend of traditional and modern residential architectural elements.
description: A spacious two-story suburban house with a multi-hipped roof, attached garage, and landscaped gardens, surrounded by a low stone wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, attached garage with a car, and a large garden area to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the rows of trees and garden beds, as well as the elongated side facade with multiple windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with more garden beds, trees, and the back facade of the house with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the backyard landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a short path, steps, and symmetrical landscaping, featuring a prominent door and minimal overhang.
